name: Sanya Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Sanya coverage with a focus on beach districts, resort pacing, and when Hainan works best as a softer southern chapter.
fullBio: The Sanya Editorial Desk maintains guides and planning coverage related to Sanya. Its focus is helping readers judge how much of Hainan should really be built around Sanya, which bay or district fits the stay, and how to preserve the city's beach-and-resort ease without turning the island into a chaotic overbuilt route.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for route fit, seasonal practicality, and whether the advice still matches current Sanya planning conditions and broader Hainan travel patterns.
seoTitle: Sanya Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Sanya guides and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
